title: cleome tenuifolia
intro: Cleome tenuifolia, also known as Spider Flower or Yellow Bee Plant, is an annual herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cleome tenuifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties in a variety of ways.
